productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Unisex SY Airline Black Bags
description: The heritage line of adidas, the adidas originals, brings to you this copiously spacious airline shoulder bag. Inspired by the retro style of the 70s and 80s, this bag makes for a great addition to your travel bag collection.Made of 100% polyamide on the outer with a 100% polyester inner liningOne main zippered compartment with a zippered pouch and organiser space on the insideOne zippered compartment on the outside Branding in print on the frontTransparent pouch on the side to slip in an identity cardWide adjustable shoulder strap made of synthetic twill tapeCareWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dirt
